name: Peppercorn Beef Flambe
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub each side of the beef with 1 teaspoon of crushed peppercorns and pat or pound lightly to set the coating.
2. Heat the butter in a skillet over a moderate flame.
3. Add the beef and sauté for 4 minutes per side.
4. Remove the beef to a carving board and slice it thinly across the grain.
5. Transfer the slices to a heated serving platter.
6. Add the brandy to the skillet and ignite it to a flame.
7. Stir in the cream, heating until the flames subside.
8. Ladle the sauce and loose peppercorns over the steak strips.
9. Serve hot.
